# Agent Surface

> Agent Surface is a practical guide and implementation kit for making software readable by AI agents and for building production-grade agent systems. It covers agent-readable surfaces, discovery, APIs, tools, MCP, auth, errors, retrieval, multi-agent orchestration, evaluation, runtime boundaries, UI, and current agent protocols.

## Start here

- [What is Agent Surface?](https://agentsurface.dev/docs) - Guide-first overview of agent-readable software and production agent systems.
- [Getting Started](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/getting-started) - A fast path for deciding whether to learn, audit, or implement.
- [Agent systems](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/agents) - Design principles, browser access, framework selection, and platform notes.
- [Scoring](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/scoring) - The readiness model for evaluating software as an agent-facing surface.
- [Tooling Catalog](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/tooling-catalog) - Curated standards, frameworks, providers, retrieval tools, eval tools, browsers, and sandboxes.
- [Reference links](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/reference-links) - Primary standards and official documentation.

## Agent-readable entry points

- [AGENTS.md](https://agentsurface.dev/AGENTS.md) - Project context and working conventions for coding agents.
- [surface skill](https://agentsurface.dev/skills/surface/SKILL.md) - The operational workflow for guide, audit, scaffold, transform, and generate tasks.
- [Full docs export](https://agentsurface.dev/llms-full.txt) - Plain-text export of all documentation pages.
- [Markdown API](https://agentsurface.dev/api/md/index) - Raw Markdown/MDX endpoint. Replace `index` with any docs slug, for example `discovery/llms-txt`.
- [MCP endpoint](https://agentsurface.dev/mcp) - Agent Surface docs tools: `search_docs` and `get_page`.

## Core topics

- [Agent systems](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/agents) - Production agent design, browser access, framework selection, and Anthropic platform notes.
- [Runtime boundaries](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/runtime-boundaries) - Choosing where agent logic, tools, state, and approvals live.
- [Agentic UI](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/agentic-ui) - Interfaces for supervising, steering, and trusting agents.
- [Multi-agent](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/multi-agent) - Orchestration, supervisors, swarms, councils, memory, human approval, and tool sprawl.
- [Data retrievability](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/data-retrievability) - RAG patterns, embeddings, multimodal retrieval, pipelines, vector stores, knowledge graphs, and retrieval anti-patterns.
- [Testing and evals](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/testing) - Evaluation strategy, metrics, judges, red-teaming, observability, CI, Promptfoo, Braintrust, and Vitest harnesses.
- [Cookbook](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/cookbook) - Reusable implementation patterns for production agents.

## Agent-readable software surfaces

- [API Surface](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/api-surface) - HTTP APIs that agents can inspect, call, and recover from.
- [Tool Design](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/tool-design) - Tool naming, schemas, safety, portability, curation, and token budgets.
- [CLI Design](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/cli-design) - JSON output, command shape, schemas, safety rails, stdin payloads, and knowledge packaging.
- [MCP Servers](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/mcp-servers) - Server architecture, transports, tools, resources, prompts, auth, annotations, testing, Next.js, and OpenAPI generation.
- [Discovery](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/discovery) - `llms.txt`, `AGENTS.md`, skills, structured data, content negotiation, `.well-known` endpoints, robots policy, and content structure.
- [Context Files](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/context-files) - `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, Cursor, Copilot, monorepos, drift detection, and context-file anti-patterns.
- [Authentication](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/authentication) - OAuth, API keys, agent identity, token exchange, DPoP, MCP auth, protected-resource metadata, `auth.md`, idempotency, and replay.
- [Error Handling](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/error-handling) - Problem Details, agent recovery hints, retries, idempotency, and CLI errors.

## Scoring and audit

- [Scoring overview](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/scoring) - The 0-3 readiness model for each dimension.
- [Rubric](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/scoring/rubric) - Dimension-by-dimension scoring criteria.
- [Scorecard format](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/scoring/scorecard-format) - Standard output for audits.
- [Evidence](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/scoring/evidence) - What counts as proof.
- [Clustering](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/scoring/clustering) - Grouping findings by implementation work.
- [Calibration](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/scoring/calibration) - Keeping reviews consistent.
- [Delta scorecard](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/scoring/delta-scorecard) - Before/after scoring for transformation work.

## Tooling catalog

- [Standards and protocols](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/tooling-catalog/standards-and-protocols) - MCP, A2A, OpenAPI, Arazzo, JSON Schema, OAuth, Problem Details, `llms.txt`, and related standards.
- [Frameworks and runtimes](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/tooling-catalog/frameworks-and-runtimes) - OpenAI Agents SDK, Anthropic, Vercel AI SDK, Cloudflare Agents, Mastra, LangGraph, and MCP-first designs.
- [Model providers and gateways](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/tooling-catalog/model-providers-and-gateways) - Providers, routing, gateways, and model access layers.
- [Retrieval and memory](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/tooling-catalog/retrieval-and-memory) - Vector databases, embedding providers, rerankers, and memory systems.
- [Evaluation and observability](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/tooling-catalog/evaluation-and-observability) - Evals, tracing, monitoring, and regression tooling.
- [Browser, sandbox, and integration](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/tooling-catalog/browser-sandbox-and-integration) - Browser automation, computer use, sandboxes, and integration surfaces.
- [Capability map](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/tooling-catalog/capability-map) - Which tool category solves which agent-system problem.

## Protocols

- [Protocols overview](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/protocols) - The agent protocol landscape.
- [MCP](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/protocols/mcp) - Model Context Protocol for tools, resources, and prompts.
- [A2A](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/protocols/a2a) - Agent-to-Agent protocol under the Linux Foundation.
- [ACP](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/protocols/acp) - Agentic Commerce Protocol from Stripe, OpenAI, and partners.
- [Comparison](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/protocols/comparison) - When MCP, A2A, or ACP is the right fit.
- [Emerging standards](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/protocols/emerging-standards) - New specifications and patterns to watch.

## Important data retrievability pages

- [RAG patterns](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/data-retrievability/rag-patterns)
- [Embeddings](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/data-retrievability/embeddings)
- [Multimodal embeddings](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/data-retrievability/multimodal-embeddings)
- [Retrieval pipeline](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/data-retrievability/retrieval-pipeline)
- [Vector databases](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/data-retrievability/vector-databases)
- [Knowledge graphs](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/data-retrievability/knowledge-graphs)
- [Retrieval anti-patterns](https://agentsurface.dev/docs/data-retrievability/anti-patterns)
